assertions.previousFailureFixed: Numeric seeds (0, 1) previously crashed with Zod validation error 'expected string, received number' — now handled correctly with numeric-to-string coercion

assertions.title: No seed parameter shows graceful behavior

steps.expected: Page does not crash; either redirects to seeded URL, shows landing page, or generates default board
steps.observed: Redirected to /game?seed=Lu0OZVNgFj with a randomly generated seed. Board renders with 25 squares and text. No crash, no blank page.

assertions.previousFailureFixed: Previously redirected but crashed with React error 'Rendered more hooks than during the previous render' — now works correctly

assertions.title: Empty seed parameter shows graceful behavior

steps.expected: Page does not crash; renders valid board or redirects gracefully
steps.observed: Redirected to /game?seed=qsuMUUdT8a with a randomly generated seed. Board renders with 25 squares and text. No crash, no blank page.

assertions.previousFailureFixed: Previously had same redirect-and-hooks-crash as VAL-BG-008 — now works correctly

summary: Tested 3 previously-failed assertions: all 3 now pass. VAL-BG-007 (edge-case seeds): all 6 seed values (0, 1, a, 00000, %20, verylong) produce valid 25-square boards with no crashes. VAL-BG-008 (no seed): gracefully redirects to a random seeded URL. VAL-BG-009 (empty seed): gracefully redirects to a random seeded URL. No console errors observed for any test case.
